+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "gitea-13539-an-internal-ci-cd-system-compatible-with-github-actions-workflow-yam",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "gitea: An internal CI/CD system compatible with Github actions workflow yaml syntax, action yaml syntax and most action plugins",
+    "description": "An internal CI/CD system compatible with Github actions workflow yaml syntax, action yaml syntax and most action plugins. Requested by 266+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current gitea setup",
+        "description": "Verify your gitea version and configuration:\n```bash\ngitea --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working gitea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review gitea configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant gitea configuration:\n# Internal CI/CD system\n\nI propose to implement an internal CI/CD system that is compatible with Github workflows `yaml` syntax, action `yaml` syntax, and most action plugins."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for An internal CI/CD system compatible with Github actions…",
+        "description": "To diff from Github Actions, I don't think we should use actions as name. `Bots` might means `automatical` but not `robot`, I'm not English native speaker and maybe there is a better name for it. This is really not only a CI/CD system, you can do more like below yml file.\n```yaml\nname: Issue post\n\non:\n  issue_comment:\n    types: [created]\n\njobs:\n  comment_created:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - run: env\n      - name: Create comment\n        uses:\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"An internal CI/CD system compatible with Github actions…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "To diff from Github Actions, I don't think we should use actions as name. `Bots` might means `automatical` but not `robot`, I'm not English native speaker and maybe there is a better name for it. This is really not only a CI/CD system, you can do more like below yml file.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "gitea",
+      "community",
+      "git-hosting",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "gitea"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/13539",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea"
+    },
+    "reactions": 266,
+    "comments": 96,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "git"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working gitea installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:58:55.918Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+}
